Handles all database operations for persons

ID of person to which this event belongs

Unique identifier for this person (non-empty string)

Person's unique ID of whom the event belongs to

PersonIDService - Class in service
Handles the functionality of retrieving of a single person - Returns the single Person object with the specified ID

PersonResult - Class in result
Response body for the /person API call

Default constructor

Proper constructor for a successful response body for the /person api call
persons - Variable in class request.LoadRequest
Array of persons to be added to the database
PersonService - Class in service
Handles the functionality of retrieving all family members - Returns ALL family members of the current user.
